orderedEvents.label: System knew
orderedEvents.details: Accepted spray record existed; contractor timing note was disputed.

orderedEvents.label: System assumed
orderedEvents.details: Weather basis was stale and marked stale, not accepted as fresh.

orderedEvents.label: System asked for
orderedEvents.details: ObservationRequest for buffer photo; request was not evidence or obligation.

orderedEvents.label: System simulated
orderedEvents.details: World-model disease-risk scenario remained Advisory Twin only.

orderedEvents.label: Allowed to see
orderedEvents.details: Farm manager and agronomy advisor had scoped permission.

orderedEvents.label: Not allowed to share
orderedEvents.details: Buyer summary excluded contractor note under redaction profile.

orderedEvents.label: Gate changed outcome
orderedEvents.details: Human approval absent, so compliance-facing document assembly remained draft.
